name: twin-of-twins-meta-watcher
description: Reads the OUTPUT records of the other three observer twins (KodyBabysitter, AuthenticityTwin, NormieAITwin, and now MutationEfficacyTwin) and judges whether they're still doing their jobs honestly. Catches the failure where a verifier degenerates — e.g., AuthenticityTwin starts always returning verdict=organic, or KodyBabysitter's findings list goes empty for fifty consecutive runs because the rule-checker logic broke silently. Closes the 'who watches the watchers' recursion.
_migrated_from_note: legacy v2 string, read-forever; the canonical rappid above is authoritative
